name: Heartbeat Worker Listing Fix
goal: Fix the heartbeat to list all workers with live tmux sessions, not just those with status='running' in the DB

tasks.name: Add get_recent_workers() to WorkerRegistry
tasks.description: Add a new method that queries running workers plus recently-finished workers within a lookback window, so the heartbeat can find alive workers even if incorrectly marked completed

steps.description: Write TestGetRecentWorkers test class in test_daemon.py
Run tests to verify they fail (method does not exist yet)
steps.expected: 5 failures — AttributeError: 'WorkerRegistry' object has no attribute 'get_recent_workers'

steps.description: Implement get_recent_workers() in worker_registry.py after get_running_workers_by_type
Run tests to verify they pass

tasks.name: Harden _get_worker_workflow_stage against TOCTOU crash
tasks.description: Wrap session_id_file.read_text() in try/except OSError so a file-vanished race does not abort the heartbeat loop mid-iteration

steps.description: Run test to verify it fails (FileNotFoundError propagates currently)
Wrap read_text() in try/except OSError in _get_worker_workflow_stage in main.py
Run full TestGetWorkerWorkflowStage to verify all tests pass
steps.expected: All tests pass including new one

tasks.name: Rewrite post_heartbeat() to use tmux_alive as ground truth
tasks.description: Replace get_running_workers() with get_recent_workers() in the heartbeat loop, add has_session() check per candidate with proper ssh_host, and fix the grader-check condition from 'if not running' to 'if not worker_details'

steps.description: Write TestPostHeartbeat class with 4 tests in test_daemon.py
Run tests to verify they fail
Rewrite the heartbeat candidate loop and grader-check condition in post_heartbeat() in main.py
Run full test suite to check for regressions
